summary: Frontend-only testing for bug fixes and UX improvements on CreateEstatePage and SignupPage. All 6 features verified working: Apt/Unit/Suite field present, First/Last Name auto-populated, Beneficiaries labels correct (not Dependents).
critical_code_review_comments: CreateEstatePage.js: addressLine2 state and input field correctly added between Street Address and City/State/ZIP
CreateEstatePage.js: First Name and Last Name auto-populated from user profile via /api/auth/me endpoint
CreateEstatePage.js: Family step labels correctly show 'Beneficiaries Under 18' and 'Beneficiaries Over 18' (lines 552, 561)
SignupPage.js: Family/marital step labels correctly show 'Beneficiaries Under 18' and 'Beneficiaries Over 18' (lines 656, 665)
No user-visible 'Dependents' text found - only variable names (dependentsOver18, dependentsUnder18) which is acceptable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for Dependents->Beneficiaries renaming and Apt/Unit/Suite field addition are complete. CreateEstatePage uses data-testid='create-estate-address-line2' for the new apt field. Family step (Step 3 on CreateEstate, Step 5 on Signup) shows correct labels. Test user already has estate so cannot submit create-estate form again.

verified_features.create_estate_apt_field: PASS - 'Apt / Unit / Suite' input field found with data-testid='create-estate-address-line2' between Street Address and City/State/ZIP
verified_features.create_estate_firstname_auto_populate: PASS - First Name pre-populated ('Test') from user profile
verified_features.create_estate_lastname_auto_populate: PASS - Last Name pre-populated ('User') from user profile
verified_features.create_estate_family_labels: PASS - Labels show 'Beneficiaries Under 18' and 'Beneficiaries Over 18'
verified_features.signup_family_labels: PASS - Labels show 'Beneficiaries Under 18' and 'Beneficiaries Over 18'
verified_features.no_dependents_text_anywhere: PASS - No user-facing 'Dependents' text found on either CreateEstatePage or SignupPage
